title: Track A: 11L U-Net + BigramHash + SmearGate + Partial RoPE + QAT (1.1349 bpb)
author: Omrigotlieb
body:
## Summary

11-layer U-Net transformer achieving **1.1349 bpb** (raw, pre-quantization) on FineWeb validation in 600 seconds on 8×H100 SXM. Post-quantization with mixed int6/int8 GPTQ-lite: **1.1618 bpb**.

### Architecture (28M params, dim=512)
- 11-layer U-Net with skip connections (5 encoder + 6 decoder)
- GQA: 8 query heads, 4 KV heads, head_dim=64
- MLP 3× expansion with LeakyReLU(0.5)² activation
- BigramHash embeddings (8192 buckets, 128-dim projection)
- SmearGate: learned prev-token blend after embedding norm
- Exclusive Self-Attention (XSA) on last 4 layers
- Partial RoPE (16/64 dims rotated, rest position-independent)
- Learned vocab_bias (per-token logit prior)
- Z-loss regularization (1e-4 × logsumexp²)

### Training
- Muon optimizer (momentum=0.99, warmup 0.92→0.99/1500 steps) + Adam for embeddings/scalars
- Gradient clipping at 0.3
- EMA weight averaging (decay=0.997)
- Late QAT: int6 STE noise in last 15% of warmdown
- Warmdown: 3500 steps, wallclock-adaptive
- seq_len=2048, batch=786K tokens/step

### Quantization
- Mixed strategy: int8 for embeddings (quality-sensitive), int6 for MLP+attention (compression-friendly)
- GPTQ-lite: best-of-5 percentile search per row
- zstd-22 compression
- Flash Attention 3 with SDPA fallback

### Results
| Seed | Raw bpb | int8 roundtrip | Mixed int6/int8 roundtrip |
|------|---------|----------------|--------------------------|
| 1337 | 1.1349  | 1.1491         | 1.1618                   |

### Artifact size
Currently 16.33MB (optimizing to fit under 16MB — reducing BigramHash size)

## Test plan
- [x] Smoke test on 2×H100 (3 iters, no crash)
- [x] Full 600s run on 8×H100 SXM
- [x] int8 roundtrip validation
- [x] Mixed int6/int8 roundtrip validation
- [ ] Final artifact under 16MB limit

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
